description: Draft viz-spec JSON files to exercise each dashboard layout pattern against the Retail Orders SDM.

f_layout.notes: Six filters, three metrics, five visualizations. Omit pattern key to auto-select f_layout when counts match.

performance_overview.requirements: 3 filters, 5 metrics with primary_metric + four secondary_metrics, 5 visualizations, pages for time navigation

spec_file_fields.pattern: Optional. When set, create_dashboard.py uses this layout instead of auto_select_pattern.
spec_file_fields.pattern_args: Optional. Passed to generate_dashboard_pattern (title_text, primary_metric, secondary_metrics, pages).
spec_file_fields.metrics: List of SDM semantic metric API names (_mtc) used by the dashboard.
spec_file_fields.filters: List of { fieldName } objects; objectName and dataType are enriched from the SDM.
spec_file_fields.visualizations: List of viz specs (at least one required for all supported patterns).

run_template: cd skills/tableau-next-author/scripts && export SF_ORG=YOUR_ORG && export SF_TOKEN=$(sf org display --target-org "$SF_ORG" --json | jq -r '.result.accessToken') && export SF_INSTANCE=$(sf org display --target-org "$SF_ORG" --json | jq -r '.result.instanceUrl') && python3 create_dashboard.py --org YOUR_ORG --sdm Retail_Orders_20260409080446 --workspace YOUR_WORKSPACE --name YOUR_DASH_NAME --viz-specs ../evals/layout_specs/FILENAME.json
